evidence: Full extension->WS->daemon->browser flow (pairing, open, attach, snapshot, click, screenshot, kill switch) is proven in a real browser via the Chrome-for-Testing live harness (test-live.sh: parity 7/7 + safety 5/5). The literal PRD V4 — a smoke in the USER'S own daily Chrome with manual unpacked-extension load — requires human pre-work 4.1 (loading the extension at chrome://extensions in their real browser) and their live session, which the agent cannot perform. Recommended as the final human smoke before wide use.
